title: Network Engineer
description:
Job Description & Requirements

Responsibilities

· Set up and maintain SSL interception and decryption in compliance with security and privacy standards.

· Utilize diagnostic tools and Splunk to analyze proxy logs, troubleshoot issues, and optimize configurations.

· Ensure compliance with relevant data protection laws and regulatory standards regarding web traffic.

· Plan and execute security-related projects, ensuring timely delivery and stakeholder alignment.

· Communicate effectively with technical and non-technical stakeholders to provide updates, insights, and recommendations.

Requirements

· Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

· Proven experience with Firewalls and Zscaler ZIA, ZPA, ZTNA

· Proven experience with F5 (LTM / GTM ), Cisco Anyconnect VPN , Firewall (Checkpoint / Palo Alto / FortiGate / FTD)

· Proven experience with Cisco ACI / Nexus NX-OS / Datacenter switches

· Strong skills in creating and managing web proxy policies.

· Proficiency in SSL interception setup and management.

· Hands-on experience with Splunk for log analysis and issue resolution.

· Familiarity with data protection regulations and compliance frameworks.

· Excellent problem-solving and communication skills.

· Experience in project planning and stakeholder management.

postedCompany.description:
Avatar Techno Services Pte Ltd. is a Consulting and Solution Provider company in the Information Technology Industry, specialized in providing sound, secure and cost-effective IT solutions to Small & Medium enterprises thereby empowering and accelerating their growth.


Incorporated in 2019, Avatar Techno Services was initially under the banner of ILC Pte Ltd., providing IT Consulting services in Singapore to a handful companies in Singapore and overseas.

Within a short-span, we have grown from simple operation providing mono-service, to a team of dedicated staff, each of which is a professional in its own field.


We have a solid reputation in the technology industry for providing excellent services to our clients. Our values are represented by our integrity, thought leadership, and commitment to maintaining a high-level of excellence in the constantly evolving world of Information Technology. We strive to build a long-lasting relationship with our customers and client satisfaction is our key performance indicator. We take pride in becoming a preferred partner for most of our clientele.


Growing over the years with our maturity in service and excellence, we progress with a clear vision of brilliance in IT.


Avatar Techno Services provides customers consulting, integration, and implementation services and specialized in bringing business process capabilities, industry experience, and solution & market expertise that can help our clientele to deploy IT solutions, maximize functionality, and rapidly achieve Return on Investment
postedCompany.name: AVATAR TECHNO SERVICES PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
